POI.copy-message: Return to Charrgate Haven Waypoint once Heart is complete.

Hawkgates Waypoint
Once HEART is Complete

Fangfury Watch Waypoint
Once HEART is Complete

Lunk Krall Waypoint
If not Contested

Brandview Waypoint
When Heart is Complete.

When heart is complete,
Terra Carorunda Waypoint

When Heart is complete Waypoint to
Town of Cowlfang's Star Waypoint
Once Heart is Complete jump back to Remanda Waypoint

POI.copy: Were you able to get the Vista and HP on Laughing Gull Island?
POI.copy-message: Were you able to get the Vista and HP on Laughing Gull Island? If not, return to Laughing Gull Waypoint then return to Whisperwill Waypoint

Grey Gritta's Waypoint
After Hero Point is done.
When Heart Complete go to Gleaner's Cove Waypoint
Jump to White Paper Waypoint once Heart is Complete.

Anchorage Waypoint
If Contested, Meddler's Waypoint and follow Dotted Line

Anchorage Waypoint
If Contested, Follow Dotted Line
